bodyTail:
bad families, so I’m not basing this on the previous inline star-removal draft. I’m moving to a hybrid: detect exact “safe-remesh” structures first, otherwise run a manifold-preserving independent-set vertex deletion with DP link retriangulation and conservative identity fallback.
